overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a student character in Hogwarts robes navigating through the castle interior. The character moves from an entrance hall through corridors and staircases, eventually reaching the kitchen area with house elves working.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance hall with gothic stone architecture

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and enters the main entrance hall
transition from stationary to walking through the doorway into the hall

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening large wooden doors to enter the crowded entrance hall

notable_agents.action: group of students in black robes walking through the hall

entered.detail: tall carved wooden doors with metal handles that open into the hall
ornate stone pillar with carved gothic details
suit of armor on display pedestal against the wall
large patterned rug on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small antechamber with large wooden doors ahead. The character opens the doors at 3 seconds and enters a spacious gothic entrance hall with stone columns, ornate armor displays, and other students walking about. The camera follows the character walking forward through the hall on stone tile flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to upper castle levels

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase
reaches top of stairs and enters the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone staircase toward the upper castle levels

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved balustrades and steps
ornate stone railing along the staircase edge
tall arched window with stone tracery letting in daylight

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase with ornate railings, moving from the entrance hall to the upper levels. Natural light filters through gothic windows as the character climbs, eventually reaching the top and entering a corridor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle corridor with gothic arches

events.description: character turns right into a narrower corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor past tapestries and wall lanterns

entered.detail: pointed stone archway at the end of the corridor
decorative hanging tapestries on the stone walls
wall-mounted iron lantern with green magical light
dark doorway leading to the spiral staircase

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper castle corridor with gothic archways and tapestries on the walls. Natural light from windows illuminates the stone passage as the character moves toward a dark doorway leading to a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow spiral staircase descending to lower levels

events.description: enters dark spiral staircase descending downward
lighting becomes significantly darker with exposed brick walls visible

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the narrow spiral stone staircase with worn steps

notable_agents.action: small figure sitting on the stairs in the shadows

entered.detail: tight winding stone staircase with worn steps and curved walls
rough red brickwork visible through damaged plaster walls
framed portrait of a bearded man hanging on the curved wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow spiral staircase and descends downward. The walls show exposed brick through damaged plaster, and the lighting grows dimmer as the character spirals down the worn stone steps, passing portrait paintings on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle kitchen with cooking hearths and storage

events.description: exits spiral staircase into large warm kitchen area with firelight
encounters house elf working at a food preparation table

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen area observing house elves working and cooking preparations

notable_agents.action: house elf wearing a hat chopping vegetables at a wooden table

entered.detail: stacked wooden storage barrels against the wall
black iron cauldron sitting on the stone floor
large fireplace with roaring fire and cooking pots
long wooden preparation tables with food items and utensils
oversized orange pumpkin next to the barrels

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the spiral staircase into a large, warm kitchen illuminated by fireplace light. The space contains wooden barrels, a giant pumpkin, cooking hearths with fires, and long preparation tables. House elves are seen working at the tables as the character walks through the kitchen area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grand, public halls of the castle down into the warm, hidden depths of the kitchens. It begins in a small antechamber before passing through large wooden doors into a spacious gothic entrance hall filled with stone columns, armor displays, and wandering students. As the character ascends a grand stone staircase, the scene shifts from the open hall to an upper corridor illuminated by natural light filtering through gothic windows and reflecting off wall tapestries. The camera then follows the character into a dark doorway, transitioning from the bright passage into a dim, narrow spiral staircase with exposed brick and portrait-lined walls. Finally, the descent opens up into a large, warm kitchen where the lighting shifts to a golden glow from fireplaces, revealing house elves working among wooden barrels, cooking hearths, and a giant pumpkin.
